name: Pizza Spinach Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Line one baking dish with foil and freeze for later use.
2. Lightly PAM the foil.
3. Spread spinach equally in both dishes.
4. Brown ground beef in a very hot pan, drain, and add pizza sauce.
5. On top of the spinach, layer 1/4 meat, 1/2 cottage cheese, and 1/2 ravioli in each dish.
6. Add remaining meat, cottage cheese, olives, and top with Parmesan cheese.
7. Cover and freeze one casserole if desired.
8. For frozen casserole, replace it in the dish and bake covered at 400°F for 1 hour and 15 minutes.
9. Uncover and bake at 350°F for an additional 30 minutes until bubbly.
10. Serve with salad and French bread.
